title: SAT command. "The options -max, -all, and -max_undef are not supported for temporal induction proofs!" error message is reported not in all cases.

features.name: tempinduct with incompatible options
features.description: Code should include a Yosys SAT command using -tempinduct temporal induction proof with conflicting options -max or -all
features.snippet:
read_verilog top.v
proc
sat -all -prove x 1 -tempinduct middle

features.name: clocked sequential element with non-blocking assignment
features.description: Code should include a sequential always block with clocked non-blocking assignment to trigger inconsistent SAT option checking

features.name: multi_module instantiation for tempinduct proof
features.description: Code should include multiple module instantiations where -tempinduct targets a secondary module
